title: MDI child z-order raise without focus steal (SetWindowPos SWP_NOACTIVATE)
desc: BringWindowToTop steals focus before SetWindowPos(SWP_NOACTIVATE) can suppress it. Use SetWindowPos(HWND_TOP+SWP_NOACTIVATE) only -- raises MDI child in z-order without activating. Applies to a11y inspect/screenshot on elevated MDI apps.
steps: WRONG: BringWindowToTop(hwnd) then SetWindowPos(HWND_TOP+SWP_NOACTIVATE) -- BringWindowToTop activates the window first, defeating SWP_NOACTIVATE.
SWP_NOACTIVATE) alone raises z-order without focus steal.
CONTEXT: InspectionCommands.Capture.cs MDI child form capture -- form.Handle raised before PrintWindow capture. BringWindowToTop was removed in commit c0a53964.
VERIFY: wkappbot a11y inspect on elevated MDI app must not steal user focus. FocusStealSentinel must not fire during a11y inspect.
author: claude
